pinyin: Zhège zì de zìyì shì shénme?
english: What is the meaning of this character?

pinyin: Tā de huàfēng bié jù mèilì.
english: Her painting style has a charm all its own.

sent_simp: 他崇尚自由平等的精神。
sent_trad: 他崇尚自由平等的精神。
pinyin: Tā chóngshàng zìyóu píngděng de jīngshén.
english: He holds the spirit of freedom and equality in high esteem.
